set_fields.description: Ralph loop configuration needs a safe service boundary before adding UI. The service should resolve which loop is being configured and mutate every field classified as user-configurable in canonical Ralph loop state without relying on Pi ambient session state.
set_fields.acceptance_criteria: A service-level API can resolve explicit and current-session Ralph loops, refuses ambiguous/missing targets with clear errors, exposes validated mutations for every field classified configurable by tau-o6hb, applies validated contract updates to .pi/loops/state/<task-id>.json, refuses unsafe active-child edits, prevents removal of required Ralph loop control tools, preserves system/runtime-only fields, and has tests for target resolution, lifecycle safety, and coverage of scalar settings plus tools and agents.
